creator: freebsd@michael-bueker.de
text:
There is a number of .svg files that the radicale web interface uses, which are not included in the ports package of radicale 3.2.0.

When the web interface is used, there are complaints about this in the log file:

> [INFO] GET response status for '/.web/css/icons/download.svg' in 0.011 seconds: 404 Not Found
> [INFO] GET response status for '/.web/css/icons/delete.svg' in 0.006 seconds: 404 Not Found
> [INFO] GET response status for '/.web/css/icons/edit.svg' in 0.014 seconds: 404 Not Found

These files are present in the distribution package from radicale itself: https://github.com/Kozea/Radicale/tree/master/radicale/web/internal_data/css/icons
